title: TERMS OF SERVICE (Part 1/2)
heading_chain: Links to Parichay by other websites/portals
heading: TERMS OF SERVICE
text:
#### TERMS OF SERVICE These terms of service (Terms) govern your use of Parichay, the Single Sign-On Platform for the Government of India and the services provided thereunder. Please read these terms and conditions (Terms) carefully before you use the Parichay platform and its services. By clicking on the 'I Agree' button, you signify your acceptance of the Terms and your agreement to be bound by them. The Terms may be amended from time to time. In order to continue using the Parichay Platform, you will be required to read and accept the revised Terms. #### SERVICE OVERVIEW Parichay is an extensive single sign-on platform, which integrates various government centric applications and provides a secure and seamless accessibility to the government users. #### Terms Of Use * NIC reserves the right to make changes to Parichay and these terms of use at any time. If those changes affect your rights or responsibilities, you will be notified through the Parichay portal. * These Terms of Service shall come into effect as soon as you have accepted it and created your Parichay
* As a user of Parichay you are granted a nonexclusive, non-transferable, revocable, limited license to access and use Parichay in accordance with these Terms of Use. NIC/Govt. of India may terminate this license at any time for any reason. * Though all efforts have been made to ensure the accuracy of the content on Parichay, the same should not be construed as a statement of law or used for any legal purposes. In case of any ambiguity or doubts, users are advised to verify/check with the concerned Ministry/Department/Organization and/or other source(s), and to obtain appropriate professional advice.
